description: default target = x86_64-unknown-linux-musl (static, no glibc dynamic loader)

asi.build_changes: .cargo/config.toml pins target = x86_64-unknown-linux-musl; autoresearch.sh mirrors target/<triple>/release/pi to target/release/pi for tooling.
asi.finding: Switching default target to x86_64-unknown-linux-musl removes glibc dynamic-loader / PLT cost. Startup 1785→680 µs (-62%). Size 5029→5159 KiB (+2.6%, the static musl libc is small). Net score 6814→5839 (-14.3%, real — 5/5 trials are 656-697 µs, well outside any prior noise band).
asi.watch_outs: If anyone profiles with perf/heaptrack later they may want PI_AR_TARGET=x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu or `cargo build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu`.
